hero.description: Farness transforms natural language commands into fully autonomous drone missions. Pipeline inspections, stockpile analysis, site surveys — all at the speed of speech.
hero.clickMicrophone: Click microphone to give a voice command

video.title: See Farness in Action
video.description: Watch how our AI agents detect, monitor, and inspect at scale with precision. From intelligent mission planning to real-time analysis and autonomous operations, experience the future of industrial technology.

aiAgents.title: Six Specialized AI Agents,
aiAgents.subtitle: One Unified Platform
aiAgents.description: Each agent is an expert in its domain. Together, they orchestrate end-to-end autonomous drone operations with precision and reliability unmatched in the industry.

useCases.title: Every Operation,
useCases.subtitle: Automated & Optimized
useCases.description: From pipeline inspection to perimeter security, Farness delivers precise AI-driven solutions tailored for the most demanding industrial environments.

technology.title: Built on the Most
technology.subtitle: Advanced Hardware
technology.description: Every component is precision-engineered for industrial-grade performance. From LiDAR sensors to edge AI processors, we use only the best.
technology.dronesDesc: Farness integrates with leading drone manufacturers for any mission profile

industries.title: Purpose-Built for
industries.subtitle: Heavy Industries
industries.description: We don't offer generic drone software. Farness is engineered for the real challenges of mining, energy, infrastructure, and industrial operations.

platform.title: Command Center for
platform.subtitle: Every Operation
platform.description: The Farness Platform brings all your drone operations into a single, powerful interface. Real-time monitoring, AI-powered analytics, mission management, and compliance tracking — all accessible from any device, anywhere.

stats.title: Results That Speak
stats.subtitle: For Themselves
stats.description: Real numbers from real deployments across the world's most demanding industrial operations.

about.title: Building the Future of
about.subtitle: Industrial Autonomy
about.description: Farness was founded with a simple but ambitious vision: eliminate the need for humans to do dangerous inspections in mining and industrial settings. We're making that vision reality.
about.mission: We're on a mission to make every industrial site safer, more efficient, and fully data-driven.
about.story: Farness was born from firsthand experience at mining and energy sites where critical inspections were being done manually — by humans in dangerous conditions, with inadequate data, at enormous cost.
about.team: We assembled a world-class team of AI researchers, robotics engineers, and industrial operations veterans to build the platform we wished existed. Today, Farness operates across 40+ mining sites in 12 countries, and we're just getting started.

demo.subtitle: Your Environment
